mapper.sql: id, name, phone, skill, price, password, total_earnings, paid_amount, remaining_amount, create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM chef WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM chef WHERE skill LIKE CONCAT('%', #{skill}, '%') AND status = 0 ORDER BY price ASC

SELECT
FROM chef
AND status = #{status}
AND skill LIKE CONCAT('%', #{skill}, '%')
ORDER BY price ASC, create_time DESC
